creator: motoom@xs4all.nl
text:
A small followup on this PR, which was closed, because of...

 > Sorry, I stopped using FUSE... You can close this PR.

Well, that doesn't solve the bug of course ;-) 

But there is good news!

The following PR is about the same problem, and the submitted patch fixes the 
crash problem with fuse-kmod:

   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=149674

Maybe set a followup to the PR 149674 ?

Greetings, 

-- 
"The ability of the OSS process to collect and harness 
the collective IQ of thousands of individuals across 
the Internet is simply amazing." - Vinod Valloppillil 
http://www.catb.org/~esr/halloween/halloween4.html
